hooks.description: Block destructive terminal commands (rm -rf, git push --force, DROP TABLE, etc.)

conditions.message: 🛑 BLOCKED: rm -rf is not allowed. Use targeted file deletion instead.
🛑 BLOCKED: git push --force can destroy remote history. Use --force-with-lease if absolutely necessary.
🛑 BLOCKED: git reset --hard discards uncommitted work. Use git stash or git checkout instead.
🛑 BLOCKED: Destructive SQL detected. Use Prisma migrations for schema changes.
🛑 BLOCKED: --turbopack has a Prisma client loading bug. Use 'npx next dev' without --turbopack.
